## Summary

Premium visual overhaul of the evaluation report running/status page to match the RevisionGrade brand design system. Replaces all blue/teal/gray utility colors with the warm stone/cream/maroon palette used throughout the submission form and landing pages.

## Scope

**Touches:**
- `app/evaluate/[jobId]/page.tsx` — page background, title typography, status badge, "Back to Evaluate" link, "Report not ready" card
- `components/EvaluationPoller.tsx` — progress bar colors, status colors, card styling, timestamp labels, refresh/cancel buttons, completion CTAs, alert boxes

**Specific changes:**
- **Progress bar**: `bg-blue-600` → warm stone gradient (`from-stone-600 to-stone-500`)
- **Status badge**: blue pill → cream (#F2EFEA) background with stone border; gold border (#A98E4A) for complete state
- **Page background**: `bg-gray-50` → warm cream `#F8F6F1`
- **Status text**: `text-blue-600` → `text-stone-800`
- **Cancel button**: `bg-red-600` → `bg-red-800` (darker maroon matching brand)
- **"Taking longer?" threshold**: `pollCount > 10` → `pollCount > 30` (prevents showing too early for 100K+ word novels)
- **Card styling**: `rounded` → `rounded-xl` with `shadow-sm`, warm stone borders
- **Headings**: `text-gray-900` → `text-stone-950 font-rg-serif` (matching editorial serif)
- **Timestamps**: labels get `uppercase tracking-wider text-stone-400` for premium editorial feel
- **Completion CTAs**: green/blue → warm cream (#F2EFEA) with gold/stone borders
- **Alert boxes**: all use `rounded-lg` consistently

**Does NOT touch:**
- Evaluation pipeline logic
- Progress calculation or polling behavior
- API routes or database queries
- Any functional behavior

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

Low risk — purely CSS/styling changes. No functional logic modified. The Tailwind classes used (`stone-*`, `rounded-xl`, `shadow-sm`, gradients) are all standard utility classes already available in the project.

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: Confirmed — visual-only changes to the evaluation status page UI
